description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named C/C++ CI that runs on push to main and on pull requests to main. Use a matrix job that builds and tests with CMake across multiple OS (ubuntu-latest, ubuntu-20.04, windows-latest), build types (Release, Debug), and C compilers (gcc, clang, cl). Check out the repository, configure CMake with the specified compilers and build settings, build the project, and run tests with ctest.
